violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 07/23/2026

The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by a milk container. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. The hand washing sink in the back of the kitchen was lacking paper towel. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2026

Raw animal foods (hamburgers) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (deli meat and cheese) in the two door refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (deli slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2026

Empanadas was observed held at (131 ) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Empanadas were cooked one hour prior to inspection, empanadas were reheated to over 165DF. Temperature of hot hold unit was increased. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2026

Food items prepared/processed were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2026

During time of inspection back door was observed left open. Establishment is to keep back kitchen door tightly closed until, screen is installed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2026

The sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/30/2025
The door to the back kitchen toilet room is not self-closing. Toilet room doors must be self closing. New Violation. Correct By: 01/30/2025
